---
title: "Project0 Report"
author: "Chengxue Li"
date: "2024-06-10"
output: pdf_document
---

## Basic Information

|                              | Stock 1 in Region 1             | Stock 2 in Region 2             |
|-----------------------|-------------------------|-------------------------|
| ***Biological Information*** |                                 |                                 |
| Number of ages               | 12                              | 12                              |
| Mean recruitment             | 44052.93                        | 22026.47                        |
| Sigma for Rec                | 0.2                             | 0.2                             |
| Sigma for NAA                | 0.2                             | 0.2                             |
| Natural mortality            | 0.2                             | 0.2                             |
| Weight-at-age                | Empirical WAA\*                 | Empirical WAA\*                 |
| Maturity-at-age              | Empirical MAA\*                 | Empirical MAA\*                 |
| Spawning season              | 0.5                             | 0.5                             |
|                              |                                 |                                 |
| ***Fishery Information***    |                                 |                                 |
| Number of fleets             | 1                               | 1                               |
| Period                       | 1973-2022                       | 1973-2022                       |
| CV                           | 0.1                             | 0.1                             |
| ESS                          | 200                             | 200                             |
| Selectivity form             | Logistic (L~50~ = 5, Slope = 1) | Logistic (L~50~ = 5, Slope = 1) |
| Likelihood for age comp.     | Multinomial                     | Multinomial                     |
|                              |                                 |                                 |
| ***Survey Information***     |                                 |                                 |
| Number of surveys            | 1                               | 1                               |
| Survey season                | 0.5                             | 0.5                             |
| Period                       | 1973-2022                       | 1973-2022                       |
| CV                           | 0.2                             | 0.2                             |
| ESS                          | 100                             | 100                             |
| Selectivity form             | Logistic (L~50~ = 2, Slope = 1) | Logistic (L~50~ = 2, Slope = 1) |
| Catchability                 | 0.2                             | 0.2                             |
| Likelihood for age comp.     | Multinomial                     | Multinomial                     |

-   Wiedenmann et al. (2017)

\newpage

## Scenarios

| Scenarios | Movement Direction | Movement Rate\* | Fishing History | Description   |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| 1         | Bidirectional      | 0.3 0.1         | Fmsy            | Ideal         |
| 2         | Bidirectional      | 0.3 0.1         | 2.5Fmsy-Fmsy    | Realistic     |
| 3         | Bidirectional      | 0.3 0.1         | 2.5Fmsy         | Unsustainable |
| 4         | Unidirectional     | 0.1             | Fmsy            | Ideal         |
| 5         | Unidirectional     | 0.1             | 2.5Fmsy-Fmsy    | Realistic     |
| 6         | Unidirectional     | 0.1             | 2.5Fmsy         | Unsustainable |

\* Movement rate is assumed to be constant outside the spawning season

## MSE Information

|                     | Value       |
|---------------------|-------------|
| Burn-in Years       | 50          |
| Feedback Years      | 15          |
| Assessment Interval | 3           |
| Total Assessments   | 5           |
| HCR                 | 75% of F40% |

## EM Structure

| Model | Type                                 | Movement | Random effects | Reference point      | Description                                    |
|------------|------------|------------|------------|------------|------------|
| EM1   | Panmictic                            | No       | NAA            | Not global SPR-based | Separate assessment models                     |
| EM2   | Spatially implicit (fleets-as-areas) | No       | NAA            | Not global SPR-based | Multiple fleets account for spatial difference |
| EM3   | Panmictic (catch aggregated)         | No       | NAA            | Not global SPR-based | Aggregate fleets across regions                |
| EM4   | Spatially explicit                   | Yes      | NAA            | Global SPR-based     | Movement rate is fixed as known                |
| EM5   | Spatially explicit                   | No       | NAA            | Global SPR-based     | Movement is not included                       |
